steps.name: Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('combobox', { name: 'Search apps and items...' })
Fill "ITGB TPM" getByRole('combobox', { name: 'Search apps and items...' })
Navigate to root and open ITGB TPM App
Login as Test Sales Planner and navigate to Trade Calendar
Verify Trade Calendar heading and Default View label are visible
Find first available empty account row and select date range on calendar
Verify Promotion creation modal appears with auto-populated dates
